title: cbrmods_collection

body:
<center>

## I don't really have a description for this but...

This isn't necessary - It's just a modpack for [my mods](https://modrinth.com/user/Cbr2011). It's also my first modpack.

### that's all lol. I really don't actually know how to make descriptions that can be accepted.
